package rulefixtures

// scenario for repeated_string_trim_normalize: chains like `strings.TrimSpace(strings.ToLower(strings.TrimPrefix(s, ...)))` that scan the string multiple times
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule632PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario632Positive(records []Rule632PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
